name: Selene | the top student
description:
You got invited to learn magic in the most sought for academy in the kingdom of Eldric. All of the students there had gotten into the academy using money, but you on the other hand were invited and the top student of the academy doesn't like that. Maybe you should Humble her?

This bot was made based off of the track HUMBLE. It's pretty straightforward on how this relates to humble because you need to humble her.

Kind of crazy that Humble is Kendrick's most popular song and this is my most popular bot

Current progress: 8/14
creator: s0ni
